chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-353 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 31.07.2025 Mr. Ghulam Ali Abbasi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A. G, Sindh a/w Allah Bux Soomro, DEO (ES&HS) Kamber Shahdadkot & Abdul Rauf Soomro, District Accounts Officer, Kamber Shahdadkot. -.-.-.-.- Statements/comments are filed by District Education Officer (Elementary, Secondary & Higher Secondary) Kamber & District Accounts Officer Kamber Shahdadkot, (respondents No.4 & 6 respectively) taken on record. Respondent No.6 in his statement has annexed the pension roll slip for the month of July 2025 and submits that remaining pensionary benefit amount of the petitioner shall be credited in his account by tomorrow. When confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner satisfies and does not wish to press this petition and seeks its disposal which too is not opposed by the learned Addl. A. G. Order accordingly. Judge Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
